title: actor_cache: publicKey not validated to belong to requested actor
description: In src/actor_cache.rs get_public_key, the code extracts actor_doc["publicKey"]["publicKeyPem"] and actor_doc["publicKey"]["id"] from the fetched document without verifying that the key's owner field matches the actor_uri that was requested. A compromised or malicious actor server could return a document whose publicKey.owner is a different actor, allowing key substitution. The cache then associates that key with the wrong actor_uri. Fix: verify that actor_doc["publicKey"]["owner"] or actor_doc["id"] matches actor_uri before caching.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
